title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Longwood, Bronx | $900–$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Longwood, Bronx. Safe, humane bat control for homes and buildings. Licensed experts. Call now for a free estimate!
intro: Longwood residents facing bat infestations need prompt, professional assistance to protect their homes and health. Best Pest Control NYC specializes in humane bat removal and exclusion services tailored to the unique architectural features of Longwood's residential buildings and multi-family homes. Our certified technicians ensure complete removal and prevention, with pricing ranging from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity and location of the infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served the Longwood community for years, understanding the specific challenges posed by older Bronx buildings where bats often roost in attics, eaves, and wall voids. Our team uses only humane, eco-friendly methods and provides guaranteed exclusion work to prevent re-entry, giving you lasting peace of mind.
localContext: Longwood's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, single-family homes near Kelly Street, and structures surrounding Longwood Park provide numerous entry points for bats seeking shelter. The neighborhood's proximity to the Bronx River and tree-lined streets creates an environment where bat populations thrive, making professional exclusion services essential for property owners.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my Longwood home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, droppings (guano) in attics or near entry points, staining around small openings in soffits or siding, and seeing bats flying around your property at twilight. If you notice any of these signs in your Longwood home, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Longwood safe and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes. We follow all New York State regulations for humane bat removal, using exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but prevent re-entry. We never use harmful chemicals or traps, and our methods protect both your family and the bat population while ensuring they don't return to your property.

faqs.question: What does the $900–$2,500 price range include?
faqs.answer: Our pricing covers a thorough inspection, humane bat removal, complete exclusion work (sealing all entry points), attic sanitization if needed, and a warranty against re-entry. The final cost depends on the colony size, number of entry points, building height, and extent of cleanup required for your specific Longwood property.

faqs.question: How long does bat exclusion take in a Longwood building?
faqs.answer: Most bat exclusion projects take 1-3 days for the initial installation of one-way devices, followed by a return visit 3-7 days later to seal entry points permanently once all bats have left. The timeline can vary based on colony size and building structure, but we work efficiently to resolve your bat problem as quickly as possible while ensuring complete removal.
